category_sources: Official documentation at https://lyz-code.github.io/yamlfix/ describes yamlfix as a YAML formatter.
source_facts.description: Simple and configurable YAML formatter that keeps comments.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://lyz-code.github.io/yamlfix/ uses the lowercase display name yamlfix.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted at https://lyz-code.github.io/yamlfix/.
Official reference documentation is hosted at https://lyz-code.github.io/yamlfix/reference/.
repo_sources: Official documentation links the project to the lyz-code/yamlfix source repository.
Official repository page at https://github.com/lyz-code/yamlfix describes yamlfix as a YAML formatter that keeps comments.
tags_sources: Official documentation states yamlfix can be used as both a command-line tool and a library.
source_facts.description identifies yamlfix as a configurable YAML formatter that keeps comments.
